narrative:
Maple Heights (precinct in Noble County) has 458 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.4 percentage points.
